notes: Shopify store (wisdomdentalsupply.com; www variant serves the same store, apex canonical). Reuses the generic Shopify adapter (adapters/shopify.ts): variant.sku -> supplier SKU (brand-prefixed, e.g. PRK-S343, DCI-7247), product.vendor -> brand, variant.price -> price, variant.available -> stock. Catalog discovered via /sitemap.xml -> sitemap_products_N.xml then pulled in full from /products.json?limit=250&page=N (~7,309 products across ~30 pages). SKU+brand matching only; variant.barcode empty (no GTIN/UPC, so no lot/expiry barcode hook), same limitation as DDI Supply and our other Shopify-sourced suppliers. Cloudflare sits in front (server: cloudflare, CF-Ray) but /products.json returns 200 logged-out with a plain UA; throttle paging (~350ms between pages) to avoid tripping the challenge. Net32 winning seller (227 wins, rank ~#16). Verified live 2026-07-01: products.json 200; 250/250 sampled variants carried a price, 249/250 a SKU, 0/250 a barcode; DS50 Split-Cartridge Dispensing Gun (sku PRK-S343, Parkell) = $149.00; /products/<handle>.json 200.
